title: Handy Andy
writer: Lewis Beach, William M. Conselman, Kubec Glasmon
actors: Will Rogers, Peggy Wood, Mary Carlisle
plot: A small-town druggist is henpecked by his social-climbing wife to sell his pharmacy to a national chain. In addition, she tries to set up her pretty young daughter with the nitwit son of the chain's owner, even though the girl is ...
